title: Senior Network Engineer - CISCO/FORTINET
description:
As a Senior Network Engineer, you will produce detailed network architecture designs and implement network systems to meet the data communication needs as required.


Responsibilities

Design and Document Preparation:

• Provide networking expertise, revise solution architecture drawings and diagrams

• Prepare the design documents including Low Level Design (LLD) documents for OPS Network and SMRC Network, firewalls configuration, IDS/IPS and hardening states.

• Prepare ITD (Test procedure) document for OPS Network and SMRC Network

· Prepare new or update all the relevant documents (e.g. Maintenance or User Manual, Config / Rollback / Troubleshoot Procedure) required for the OPS Network (FMC, FTD (firewalls)) and SMRC Network (OFL+ONL)

Integration Support:

• Support configuration changes to system platforms in factory and customer sites.

• Work on the configurations of interfaces, zones, firewall policies, IPS, application filtering for single firewall (Offline)

• Support the integration of Offline HSE and Offline Remote Site Switches with Offline SMRC Servers e.g. PIM/PAM, SNMS/SMS/NMS/LMS, RADIUS, NTP, SIEM etc (Offline)

• Support the integration of Online AMTS New HSE & Remote sites switches with Offline SMRC Servers e.g. PIM/PAM, SNMS/SMS/LMS, RADIUS, NTP, SIEM etc. (Offline)

• Assist in the SMRC network configuration, Integration, testing, verification and troubleshooting of the following technology used in SMRC Network (Online SMRC)

• Work on the configuration, integration, testing, verification and troubleshooting of Online OPS Network selected firewalls / external interfaces (particularly from the Firewall application content inspection (Layer 4 through Layer 7)) (OPS Network)

• Configure, optimize and test the transparent firewall failover functionality running in HA and standalone mode with online interfaces for the traffic impact (OPS Network)

• Support External Support Platform (ESP) setup, including network platform configuration & Integration (Layer 2 and Layer 3) of switch, configure firewall with S2S VPN, DMZ, NAT and Internet using ACL policies, IPS policies, URL & Content filtering policies, VPN policies, NAT policies, hardening of switch and firewall as per the hardening guideline

• Provide troubleshooting support during online deployment & integration (OPS Network)

Hardening Support:

• Assist on the hardening of Online / Offline SMRC network equipment and firewalls

• Assist on the hardening of Online / offline OPS firewalls (OPS Network).

• Troubleshoot / fix any operational / unknown issues occurs in the environment due to the hardening configuration on network devices (Offline, Online SMRC)

• Support in case any issue with hardening of online firewalls / any operational issue occurs due to the hardening of online network devices (OPS Network)


Requirements

· Degree in Electrical / Electronic / Telecommunications Engineering

· Minimum 5 years of experience working in the relevant field/industry

· At least cat 2 security clearance

· Strong advantage on following Professional qualifications:

Ø Cisco Certified Networking Associate (CCNA), Cisco Certified Networking Professional (CCNP), Cisco Certified Design Associate (CCDA)

Ø Huawei Certified ICT Associate (HCIA), Huawei Certified ICT Professional (HCIP)

Ø Or other vendor specific courses, such as Juniper Certified Internet Expert (JNCIE)

· Professional knowledge and experience in network detailed design and implementations

Ø On technologies including SDH, MPLS-TP, IP, IP/MPLS, Ethernet etc,

Ø Cable network design (fibre, copper, structured cabling),

Ø 4G/5G/Wifi network design,

Ø Infra design (Virtualisation, VMWare, Windows, Linux, IT services),

Ø Cybersecurity implementation (Hardening, FW, AV,…),

Ø Scripting (python, …),

Ø Network detailed design, administration, troubleshooting, capacity optimization,

Ø Network security design and implementation.

· Demonstrating a degree of initiative, and resourcefulness in solving problems

· Resourceful and analytical in design activities, ability to use pertinent data for meticulous recommendations

postedCompany.description:
Anotech for ALTEN

ANOTECH is a subsidiary of ALTEN Group founded in 2006 to provide specialty engineering services. We are a global engineering & consulting company providing its services across Europe, Americas and Asia.

Headquartered in Paris - France, ALTEN Group relies on its subsidiaries such as ANOTECH in Singapore to deliver the highest standard of services within engineering, projects and operations with a global approach while maintaining an agility to deliver local tailor-made solutions.

Created 30 years ago and present in more than 25 countries, ALTEN GROUP achieved sales of over 2 billion euros in 2020 and currently has 34,000 employees, 90% of whom are engineers.

ALTEN GROUP is represented in SINGAPORE by a 100%-owned subsidiary ANOTECH ENERGY SINGAPORE and now we are bringing the experience of our mother company ALTEN GROUP to SEA countries.

We deliver the highest standard of services within product management, system engineering, and agile practices.

Our major activities are within the fields of infrastructure & energy, life-sciences, IT & telecom, banking & insurance, and transportation


Please feel free to visit our website: www.anotech-energy.com or send your resume to hr-singapore@anotech-energy.com
postedCompany.name: ANOTECH ENERGY SINGAPORE PTE. LTD.
